Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('framework:', d.get\('framework'\)\); print\('rootDirectory:', d.get\('rootDirectory'\)\); print\('buildCommand:', d.get\('buildCommand'\)\); print\('outputDirectory:', d.get\('outputDirectory'\)\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const o=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('framework:', o.framework\); console.log\('rootDirectory:', o.rootDirectory\); console.log\('buildCommand:', o.buildCommand\); console.log\('outputDirectory:', o.outputDirectory\); console.log\('installCommand:', o.installCommand\);}\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const o=JSON.parse\(d\); \(o.envs||[]\).forEach\(e=>console.log\(e.key, '=', e.value||'[encrypted]'\)\);}\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ try{ const o=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(o,null,2\)\); }catch\(e\){console.log\(d\);}}\);")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ const o=JSON.parse\(d\); const keys=Object.keys\(o\).filter\(k=>k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('protect'\)||k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('auth'\)||k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('sso'\)||k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('bypass'\)||k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('access'\)||k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('deploy'\)\); keys.forEach\(k=>console.log\(k,':',JSON.stringify\(o[k]\)\)\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ try{const o=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('ssoProtection:', o.ssoProtection\);}catch\(e\){console.log\(d\);} }\);")
Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ const o=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\(Object.keys\(o\).join\('\\n'\)\); }\);")
